Accordion.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content. Built on Radix UI Accordion primitive.

AccordionItem.description: Contains all the parts of a collapsible section within an Accordion.

AccordionTrigger.description: Toggles the collapsed state of its associated AccordionItem.

AccordionContent.description: Contains the collapsible content for an AccordionItem.

Alert.description: Displays a callout for important information. Supports default and destructive variants.

AlertTitle.description: Title element rendered inside an Alert component.

AlertDescription.description: Description element rendered inside an Alert component.

AlertDialog.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response. Built on Radix UI AlertDialog.

AlertDialogTrigger.description: The button that opens the AlertDialog.

AlertDialogContent.description: The content container for the AlertDialog overlay.

AlertDialogHeader.description: Header section of AlertDialog containing title and description.

AlertDialogFooter.description: Footer section of AlertDialog containing action and cancel buttons.

AlertDialogTitle.description: An accessible name for the AlertDialog.

AlertDialogDescription.description: An accessible description for the AlertDialog.

AlertDialogAction.description: The confirm action button in an AlertDialog.

AlertDialogCancel.description: The cancel button in an AlertDialog. Closes the dialog.

AspectRatio.description: Displays content within a desired ratio. Built on Radix UI AspectRatio.

Avatar.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user. Built on Radix UI Avatar.

AvatarImage.description: The image rendered inside an Avatar. Falls back to AvatarFallback on error.

AvatarFallback.description: Fallback element rendered when AvatarImage fails to load.

Badge.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge. Variants: default, secondary, outline, destructive.

Button.description: A button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon).

Calendar.description: A date picker calendar built on react-day-picker. Supports single, multiple, and range selection modes.

Card.description: A container component with header, content, and footer sections.

CardHeader.description: The header section of a Card.

CardTitle.description: The title element within a CardHeader.

CardDescription.description: The description element within a CardHeader.

CardContent.description: The main content area of a Card.

CardFooter.description: The footer section of a Card.

Checkbox.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked. Built on Radix UI Checkbox.

Collapsible.description: An interactive component which expands and collapses content. Built on Radix UI Collapsible.

Command.description: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu. Built on cmdk.

CommandDialog.description: A dialog wrapper for the Command component for modal command palette usage.

ContextMenu.description: Displays a menu at the pointer's position on right-click. Built on Radix UI ContextMenu.

Dialog.description: A window overlaid on the primary content. Renders into portal. Built on Radix UI Dialog.

DialogContent.description: The content container for Dialog with overlay backdrop.

DialogHeader.description: Header section of Dialog containing title and description.

DialogFooter.description: Footer section of Dialog containing action buttons.

DialogTrigger.description: The element that triggers opening the Dialog.

Drawer.description: A drawer component for mobile-friendly panels. Built on vaul.

DropdownMenu.description: Displays a menu triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI DropdownMenu.

Form.description: Form component that wraps react-hook-form's FormProvider for accessible form fields with validation.

FormField.signature: const FormField: <TFieldValues extends FieldValues, TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues>>({ ...props }: FormFieldContextValue<TFieldValues, TName>) => React.ReactElement
FormField.description: Connects a form control to react-hook-form with automatic error handling and accessibility.

FormItem.description: Container for a single form field including label, control, description, and message.

FormLabel.description: Accessible label for a form field. Automatically associated with the control.

FormControl.description: Wraps the form input/control element with proper aria attributes.

FormDescription.description: Descriptive help text for a form field.

FormMessage.description: Displays validation error message for a form field.

HoverCard.description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link. Built on Radix UI HoverCard.

Input.description: A styled HTML input element that extends native input props with shadcn/ui theming.

Label.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls. Built on Radix UI Label.

Popover.description: Displays rich content in a portal triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI Popover.

Progress.description: Displays an indicator showing completion progress of a task. Built on Radix UI Progress.

RadioGroup.description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup.

ScrollArea.description: Augments native scroll functionality with custom cross-browser styling. Built on Radix UI ScrollArea.

Select.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from. Built on Radix UI Select.

Separator.description: Visually or semantically separates content. Built on Radix UI Separator.

Sheet.description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen. Extends Dialog component.

Skeleton.description: Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.

Slider.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range. Built on Radix UI Slider.

Switch.description: A control that allows toggling between checked and unchecked. Built on Radix UI Switch.

Table.description: A responsive table component with header, body, row, and cell subcomponents.

Tabs.description: A set of layered sections of content displayed one at a time. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

Textarea.description: A styled HTML textarea element for multi-line text input.

Toast.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily. Built on Radix UI Toast.

Toaster.description: Renders toast notifications. Add once to root layout.

Toggle.description: A two-state button that can be on or off. Built on Radix UI Toggle.

ToggleGroup.description: A group of toggle buttons supporting single or multiple selection. Built on Radix UI ToggleGroup.

Tooltip.description: A popup displaying information related to an element on hover/focus. Built on Radix UI Tooltip.

TooltipProvider.description: Wraps your app to enable Tooltip functionality. Required ancestor for Tooltip components.

TooltipTrigger.description: The element that triggers the Tooltip on hover/focus.

TooltipContent.description: The content displayed inside the Tooltip popup.

cn.description: Utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge. Handles conditional classes and deduplication of conflicting utilities.

cva.signature: function cva(base?: ClassValue, config?: Config): (props?: ConfigVariants & ClassProp) => string
cva.description: Creates variant-based className functions. The core utility from class-variance-authority used to define component variants.

buttonVariants.signature: const buttonVariants: (props?: { variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'; size?: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon' } & ClassProp) => string
buttonVariants.description: Pre-defined CVA variant function for Button. Use to apply button styles to non-button elements like links.

badgeVariants.description: Pre-defined CVA variant function for Badge.

useToast.signature: function useToast(): { toast: (props: ToastProps) => { id: string; dismiss: () => void; update: (props: ToastProps) => void }; toasts: ToasterToast[]; dismiss: (toastId?: string) => void }
useToast.description: Hook that returns the toast function and toasts array. Used to imperatively show toast notifications.

toast.signature: function toast(props: { title?: string; description?: string; variant?: 'default' | 'destructive'; action?: ToastActionElement }): { id: string; dismiss: () => void; update: (props: ToastProps) => void }
toast.description: Function to imperatively show a toast notification.

useFormField.signature: function useFormField(): { invalid: boolean; isDirty: boolean; isTouched: boolean; error?: FieldError; id: string; name: string; formItemId: string; formDescriptionId: string; formMessageId: string }
useFormField.description: Hook that returns the current form field context. Used internally by FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage.

--background.description: CSS custom property for the default page background color.

--foreground.description: CSS custom property for the default text/foreground color.

--primary.description: CSS custom property for the primary brand color.

--secondary.description: CSS custom property for the secondary color.

--muted.description: CSS custom property for muted backgrounds and text.

--accent.description: CSS custom property for accent highlights.

--destructive.description: CSS custom property for destructive action colors (e.g., red).

--border.description: CSS custom property for default border colors.

--input.description: CSS custom property for input element border colors.

--ring.description: CSS custom property for focus ring outline colors.

--radius.description: CSS custom property for the default border radius.

--card.description: CSS custom property for card background color.

--popover.description: CSS custom property for popover background color.
